creator: santiagorr@riseup.net
text:
Could you please include stubby in the getdns pkg?

% pkg list getdns | grep stubby ; echo $?
1

% pkg show getdns
getdns-1.4.2
Name           : getdns
Version        : 1.4.2
Installed on   : Fri Sep 21 06:33:49 2018 UTC
Origin         : dns/getdns
Architecture   : FreeBSD:11:amd64
…

Thanks

 -- S
